message:
feat(wezterm): split_pane_with_cx — pane-lifecycle trail complete (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Final slice on the pane-lifecycle Cx-first trail begun in tick 40.

Addition (strictly additive, asupersync-runtime-gated):

  * `WeztermClient::split_pane_with_cx(cx, pane_id, direction, cwd,
    percent)` — Cx-first parallel of `split_pane`. Routes through
    `run_cli_with_pane_check_with_cx` since split-pane operates on an
    existing `pane_id` and should surface `PaneNotFound` on stale
    ids. Preserves argv construction bit-for-bit:
      - direction → `--left` / `--right` / `--top` / `--bottom`
      - cwd → `--cwd=<dir>`
      - percent → clamped to [10, 90] then `--percent=<n>`

Regression test `split_pane_with_cx_short_circuits_on_missing_socket`
exercises two distinct argv shapes:
  * `SplitDirection::Left`, no cwd, no percent (minimal argv)
  * `SplitDirection::Bottom`, `Some("/tmp")`, `Some(30)` (exercises
    both Option<_> append branches together)

If any of the conditional argv appends regressed on the Cx path, the
resulting argv would either succeed (fast-fail wouldn't engage) or
surface a different error variant than SocketNotFound.

Pane-lifecycle Cx-first surface on WeztermClient inherent methods is
now complete — every pane-lifecycle public async method has a
`_with_cx` sibling routing through the tick-40 helper chain:
  * `activate_pane` → `activate_pane_with_cx`  (tick 40)
  * `kill_pane`     → `kill_pane_with_cx`      (tick 41)
  * `zoom_pane`     → `zoom_pane_with_cx`      (tick 41)
  * `spawn`         → `spawn_with_cx`          (tick 42)
  * `spawn_targeted` → `spawn_targeted_with_cx` (tick 42)
  * `split_pane`    → `split_pane_with_cx`     (tick 43, this commit)

Legacy methods remain untouched; non-migrated callers continue on
the `timeout()` path unchanged.

Verification (local fork bypass, CC=llvm clang,
CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/ft-rusticmaple-target):
  * wezterm:: — 166 passed / 0 failed (tick 42: 165 -> tick 43: 166,
    +1 new test)
  * cargo fmt -p frankenterm-core -- --check — clean

Bead: ft-xbnl0.2.3

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
